text.title: Pricing Strategy Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Pricing Strategy.

example.scenario: Solo SaaS, cost floor $4/customer/month, ceiling $89 from 12 interviews.
example.trace: floor $4 → ceiling $89 → model subscription → price points [$9 / $29 / $79] → 60-day test plan (conv + churn + ARPU) → grandfather 12 months
